race.description: John Mcgrath Auto Group Black Opal Stakes (G3)
race.comment: The Waterhouse-Bott yard has a strong chance with EVICTION NOTICE (4) who has had three starts all at Group level, where he's led. Has placed both this preparation, the latest a strong effort behind Stretan Ruler in the Silver Slipper Stakes. Is on an upward trajectory and can threaten with average luck from the awkward gate. PEARL OF DUBAI (9) resumed in the Widden Stakes and looked a run short. Just missed in a Randwick trial since, and has the blinkers on for the first time. She's another badly treated at the barriers but can make the finish with average luck. ARTANEOUS (15) was tipped out after a 3L defeat in the Group 3 Breeders Plate on debut. Owns a metro trial win and draws low. She's likely to race well, and the locals -  BAR JESTER (2) and MUSIC TIME (3) - are not without hopes. They stopped the clock sharply enough in the local lead up and look up to giving Canberra's biggest race a shake.
